## Summary

- Describe the main change made in this pull request.
- Explain why the change was needed.

## Screenshots

- Add before/after screenshots if the change affects the UI.
- If not applicable, write `N/A`.

## Testing Evidence

- List the tests or manual checks performed.
- Include key results or observations.

## Linked Issue

- Reference the related issue number or backlog item.
- Example: `Closes #12` or `Related to US-04`

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I included screenshots when the UI changed
- [ ] I linked the related issue or backlog item
